Convert a PDF file to PDF/A file with a particular flavor (e.g. "2b")

Source: R/utils_convert_pdf_to_pdfa.R
dot-convert_pdf_to_pdfa.Rd

Convert a PDF file to PDF/A file with a particular flavor (e.g. "2b")

Usage

.convert_pdf_to_pdfa(pdf_path, save_to, pdf_flavor = "2b")

Arguments

pdf_flavor
